single_probability_query: Treat each sector as equally likely for one spin, compute the probability, then choose the matching visible A-F fraction option.
Use the equal sectors to compute the requested one-spin probability, then answer with the matching option letter.
Answer from the visible sector colors and shape markers by choosing the matching A-F fraction option.
Compute the requested probability from the shown equal-sector spinner and select the visible option with that fraction.
Use one random spin of the spinner for the probability question, then choose the matching visible A-F option.
pair_probability_query: Treat one spin of Spinner A and one spin of Spinner B as independent, compute the probability, then choose the matching visible A-F fraction option.
Use the product space formed by one equal-likelihood sector from each spinner, then answer with the matching option letter.
Compute the requested probability from the two visible spinners and select the visible option with that fraction.
Answer using one independent spin of each shown spinner, then choose the matching visible A-F option.
Use Spinner A and Spinner B as the two independent sources for the event, and answer with the matching option letter.

single_color_probability: What is the probability that one spin lands on a sector that is {event_description}?
For one spin, what is the probability of landing on a sector that is {event_description}?
Find the probability that the pointer lands on a sector that is {event_description}.
What probability corresponds to landing on a sector that is {event_description}?
For a random spin, what is the probability that the selected sector is {event_description}?

global.json_output_contract: Use a valid JSON object with keys "annotation" and "answer" in that order for the final answer.
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Use a valid JSON object with key "answer" for the final answer.
global.answer_hint: set "answer" to the letter of the visible option (A, B, C, D, E, or F) whose fraction matches the probability
global.object_description_single_probability_qu: one equal-sector spinner. Each sector has a color and a shape marker
one card-style equal-sector spinner. Each sector has a color and a shape marker
one notebook-style equal-sector spinner. Each sector has a color and a shape marker
global.object_description_pair_probability_quer: two independent equal-sector spinners labeled Spinner A and Spinner B. Each sector has a color
two independent card-style equal-sector spinners labeled Spinner A and Spinner B. Each sector has a color
two independent notebook-style equal-sector spinners labeled Spinner A and Spinner B. Each sector has a color

query:single_color_probability.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the full spinner panel bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1]

query:single_shape_probability.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the full spinner panel bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1]

query:single_color_or_shape_probability.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the full spinner panel bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1]

query:pair_both_target_color_probability.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object with keys "spinner_a" and "spinner_b", each mapped to that spinner panel bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1]

query:pair_at_least_one_target_color_pro.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object with keys "spinner_a" and "spinner_b", each mapped to that spinner panel bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1]

query:pair_same_color_probability.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object with keys "spinner_a" and "spinner_b", each mapped to that spinner panel bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1]
